segments.text: Lesson 44.

translations.zh-Hans: 第44课。

segments.text: Speed and Comfort.

translations.zh-Hans: 速度与舒适。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答以下问题。

segments.text: Which type of transport does the rider prefer, do you think?

translations.zh-Hans: 你认为作者更喜欢哪种交通方式？

segments.text: People traveling long distances frequently have to decide whether they would prefer to go by land, sea, or air.

translations.zh-Hans: 长途旅行的人经常要决定走陆路、海路还是乘飞机。

segments.text: Hardly anyone can positively enjoy sitting in a train for more than a few hours.

translations.zh-Hans: 几乎没人真能享受在火车上一坐数小时的滋味。

segments.text: Train compartments soon get cramped and stuffy.

translations.zh-Hans: 车厢很快就会变得拥挤而闷热。

segments.text: It is almost impossible to take your mind off the journey.

translations.zh-Hans: 你几乎不可能不去想旅途本身。

segments.text: Reading is only a partial solution, for the monotonous rhythm of the wheels clicking on the rails soon lulls you to sleep.

translations.zh-Hans: 读书只能部分解决问题，因为车轮敲击铁轨的单调节奏很快就会催你入睡。

segments.text: During the day, sleep comes in snatches.

translations.zh-Hans: 白天只能断断续续地睡。

segments.text: At night, when you really wish to go to sleep, you rarely manage to do so.

translations.zh-Hans: 夜里真正想睡时，却很少能如愿。

segments.text: If you are lucky enough to get a sleeper, you spend half the night staring at the small blue light in the ceiling, or fumbling to find your ticket for inspection.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果有幸买到卧铺，你会花半夜盯着天花板上的蓝色小灯，或摸索着找车票接受检查。

segments.text: Inevitably, you arrive at your destination almost exhausted.

translations.zh-Hans: 到达目的地时，你必然已经精疲力竭。

segments.text: Long car journeys are even less pleasant, for it is quite impossible even to read.

translations.zh-Hans: 长途汽车旅行更不愉快，因为你甚至根本无法看书。

segments.text: On motorways, you can, at least, travel fairly safely at high speeds.

translations.zh-Hans: 在高速公路上，至少还能以较高速度相对安全地行驶。

segments.text: But more often than not, the greater part of the journey is spent on roads with few service stations and too much traffic.

translations.zh-Hans: 但往往旅程大部分是在服务站稀少、车流过多的道路上度过的。

segments.text: By comparison, ferry trips or cruises offer a great variety of civilized comforts.

translations.zh-Hans: 相比之下，渡轮或游轮提供了各种文明而舒适的享受。

segments.text: You can stretch your legs on the spacious decks, play games, meet interesting people, and enjoy good food.

translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在宽敞的甲板上活动腿脚、玩游戏、结识有趣的人并享用美食。

segments.text: Always assuming, of course, that the sea is calm.

translations.zh-Hans: 当然，前提始终是海面风平浪静。

segments.text: If it is not, and you are likely to get seasick, no form of transport could be worse.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果海上不平静，而你又容易晕船，那就没有比这更糟的交通方式了。

segments.text: Even if you travel in ideal weather, sea journeys take a long time.

translations.zh-Hans: 即使天气理想，海上旅行仍要花很长时间。

segments.text: Relatively few people are prepared to sacrifice holiday time for the pleasure of traveling by sea.

translations.zh-Hans: 愿意牺牲假期时间来享受海上旅行乐趣的人相对很少。

segments.text: Airplanes have the reputation of being dangerous, and even hardened travelers are intimidated by them.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机素有危险之名，就连久经旅行的人也会对它心存畏惧。

segments.text: They also have the disadvantage of being an expensive form of transport.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机还有费用昂贵这个缺点。

segments.text: But nothing can match them for speed and comfort.

translations.zh-Hans: 但在速度和舒适方面，没有任何交通工具能同它相比。

segments.text: Traveling at a height of 30,000 feet, far above the clouds, and at over 500 miles an hour is an exhilarating experience.

translations.zh-Hans: 在云层之上3万英尺高空，以每小时500多英里的速度飞行，是一种令人振奋的体验。

segments.text: You do not have to devise ways of taking your mind off the journey, for an airplane gets you to your destination rapidly.

translations.zh-Hans: 你不必设法转移对旅途的注意力，因为飞机很快就把你送到目的地。

segments.text: For a few hours, you settle back in a deep armchair to enjoy the flight.

translations.zh-Hans: 几个小时里，你可以靠在宽大的扶手椅中享受飞行。

segments.text: The real escapist can watch a film and sip champagne on some services.

translations.zh-Hans: 在某些航班上，真正想逃离现实的人还能看电影、啜饮香槟。

segments.text: But even when such refinements are not available, there is plenty to keep you occupied.

translations.zh-Hans: 即使没有这些精致享受，也有很多事情可做。

segments.text: An airplane offers you an unusual and breathtaking view of the world.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机为你呈现一幅非同寻常、激动人心的世界景观。

segments.text: You soar effortlessly over high mountains and deep valleys.

translations.zh-Hans: 你毫不费力地飞越高山和深谷。

segments.text: You really see the shape of the land.

translations.zh-Hans: 你真正看清了大地的轮廓。

segments.text: If the landscape is hidden from view, you can enjoy the extraordinary sight of unbroken cloud planes that stretch out for miles before you, while the sun shines brilliantly in a clear sky.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果地面景色被遮住，你可以欣赏连绵数英里的完整云海这一奇景，而太阳则在澄澈天空中灿烂照耀。

segments.text: The journey is so smooth that there is nothing to prevent you from reading or sleeping.

translations.zh-Hans: 旅途如此平稳，没有什么能妨碍你读书或睡觉。

segments.text: However you decide to spend your time, one thing is certain.

translations.zh-Hans: 无论你决定怎样打发时间，有一点是肯定的。

segments.text: You will arrive at your destination, fresh and uncrumpled.

translations.zh-Hans: 抵达目的地时，你会精神焕发、衣着整齐。
